feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Judge: Trump Needs To Pay Stormy Daniels Even More Money

link.title: Judge: Trump Needs To Pay Stormy Daniels Even More Money

entry.content:
After already having paid her $130,000 in hush money, it’s time for President Donald Trump to pay adult film actress Stormy Daniels once again.
CNN reports a California Superior Court judge has ordered Trump to pay $44,100 to adult film actress Stephanie Clifford, to reimburse her attorneys’ fees.
CNN reports the judge’s order was issued Monday and was posted online Friday by Clifford’s attorneys. Clifford’s stage name is Stormy Daniels.
Judge Robert Broadbelt III ruled that Clifford was entitled to legal fees, finding her the ‘prevailing party’ under California law, despite the case having been dismissed.
Clifford says she had an affair with Trump from 2006 to 2007 and signed a $130,000 nondisclosure agreement with former Trump attorney Michael Cohen.
Cohen represented a shell company and a ‘David Dennison,’ which Clifford contends is a pseudonym for Trump. Trump denies the affair occurred.
entry.summary: After already having paid her $130,000 in hush money, it’s time for President Donald Trump to pay adult film actress Stormy Daniels once again. CNN reports a California Superior Court judge has ordered Trump to pay $44,100 to adult film actress Stephanie Clifford, to reimburse her attorneys’ fees. CNN reports the judge’s order was issued Monday and was posted online Friday by Clifford’s attorneys. Clifford’s stage name is Stormy Daniels. Judge Robert Broadbelt III ruled that Clifford was entitled to legal fees, finding her the ‘prevailing party’ under California law, despite the case having been dismissed. Clifford says she had an affair with Trump from 2006 to 2007 and signed a $130,000 nondisclosure agreement with former Trump attorney Michael Cohen. Cohen represented a shell company and a ‘David Dennison,’ which Clifford contends is a pseudonym for Trump. Trump denies the affair occurred.

entry.title: Six conseils pour supporter la pression

link.title: Six conseils pour supporter la pression

entry.content:
La pression, on l’a tous déjà ressentie. Avant un entretien d’embauche, une épreuve sportive, une confrontation… Les astuces de Raphaël Homat, préparateur mental, pour mieux la gérer./>

entry.title: Top 10 des transferts les plus prolifiques de l’histoire du foot Oh My Goal

link.title: Top 10 des transferts les plus prolifiques de l’histoire du foot Oh My Goal

entry.content:
Savoir acheter est une chose, savoir vendre en est une autre ! Certains clubs sont connus pour savoir réaliser de superbes plus-values ! Voici le top 10 des meilleurs plus-values de transfert !
————————
N’oublie pas de liker, de commenter et de partager cette vidéo. Toutes les réactions sont bonnes à prendre, nous n’hésiterons pas à utiliser tes retours pour nos prochaines vidéos.

entry.title: Kumulo Creative Compound, Spot Nongkrong yang Lagi Hype

link.title: Kumulo Creative Compound, Spot Nongkrong yang Lagi Hype

entry.content:
Seiring kembalinya aktivitas di wilayah Jabodetabek, keinginan orang-orang untuk keluar rumah pun mulai kembali. Bagi Anda yang sudah merasa bosan , namun masih khawatir ke luar rumah karena sulit untuk menghindari kontak dari banyak orang, salah satu tempat di BSD ini bisa jadi destinasi Anda di masa pandemi ini.
Destinasi hangout terbaru ini bernama Kumulo. Kumulo merupakan sebuah creative compound dengan tema outdoor yang menampung 25 tenats. Berlokasi di The Breeze BSD City, Kumulo sangat memanfaatkan dengan baik area terbuka di lokasi tersebut.
Keberadaan Kumulo sebagai sebuah creative compound juga memiliki harapan untuk dapat mengembangkan industri kreatif lokal bersama-sama. Untuk informasi selengkapnya, tonton liputan Suara.com di atas ya!
#Kumolo #TheBreeze #LocalBrand
Video Editor: Dewi Yuliantini
==================================
Homepage:
Facebook Fan Page:
Instagram:
Twitter:
entry.summary: Seiring kembalinya aktivitas di wilayah Jabodetabek, keinginan orang-orang untuk keluar rumah pun mulai kembali. Bagi Anda yang sudah merasa bosan , namun masih khawatir ke luar rumah karena sulit untuk menghindari kontak dari banyak orang, salah satu tempat di BSD ini bisa jadi destinasi Anda di masa pandemi ini. Destinasi hangout terbaru ini bernama Kumulo. Kumulo merupakan sebuah creative compound dengan tema outdoor yang menampung 25 tenats. Berlokasi di The Breeze BSD City, Kumulo sangat memanfaatkan dengan baik area terbuka di lokasi tersebut. Keberadaan Kumulo sebagai sebuah creative compound juga memiliki harapan untuk dapat mengembangkan industri kreatif lokal bersama-sama. Untuk informasi selengkapnya, tonton liputan Suara.com di atas ya! #Kumolo #TheBreeze #LocalBrand Video Editor: Dewi Yuliantini ================================== Homepage: Facebook Fan Page: Instagram: Twitter:

entry.title: Rekonstruksi Adegan Penembakan Bos Pelayaran di Kelapa Gading

link.title: Rekonstruksi Adegan Penembakan Bos Pelayaran di Kelapa Gading

entry.content:
Subdit Resmob Ditreskrimum Polda Metro Jaya merekonstruksi adegan detik-detik penembakan bos pelayaran Sugianto (51) di Ruko Royal Gading Square, Kelapa Gading, Jakarta Utara, Selasa (25/8/2020).
Link Terkait:
Pantauan suara.com di lokasi, tersangka DM alias Mahfud (50) selaku eksekutor memperagakan adegan penembakan menggunakan senjata api pengganti dengan peluru hampa. Awak media dan warga sekitar yang menyaksikan jalannya proses rekonstruksi pun diingatkan untuk tidak kaget atau takut saat mendengar ledakan suara tembakan.
#Rekonstruksi #BosPelayaran #KelapaGading
==================================
Homepage:
Facebook Fan Page:
Instagram:
Twitter:
entry.summary: Subdit Resmob Ditreskrimum Polda Metro Jaya merekonstruksi adegan detik-detik penembakan bos pelayaran Sugianto (51) di Ruko Royal Gading Square, Kelapa Gading, Jakarta Utara, Selasa (25/8/2020). Link Terkait: Pantauan suara.com di lokasi, tersangka DM alias Mahfud (50) selaku eksekutor memperagakan adegan penembakan menggunakan senjata api pengganti dengan peluru hampa. Awak media dan warga sekitar yang menyaksikan jalannya proses rekonstruksi pun diingatkan untuk tidak kaget atau takut saat mendengar ledakan suara tembakan. #Rekonstruksi #BosPelayaran #KelapaGading ================================== Homepage: Facebook Fan Page: Instagram: Twitter:

entry.title: Locsin wants termination of deals with Chinese firms on US blacklist

link.title: Locsin wants termination of deals with Chinese firms on US blacklist

entry.content: ‘If I find that any of those companies are doing business with us, then I would strongly recommend that we terminate the relationship with that company,’ says Foreign Secretary Teodoro Locsin Jr. Full story:
entry.summary: ‘If I find that any of those companies are doing business with us, then I would strongly recommend that we terminate the relationship with that company,’ says Foreign Secretary Teodoro Locsin Jr. Full story:

entry.title: Viral Video: Haryana में सास को बहू ने बेरहमी से पीटा, पोते ने बनाया वीडियो वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Viral Video: Haryana में सास को बहू ने बेरहमी से पीटा, पोते ने बनाया वीडियो वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
A case of embarrassing humanity has been reported from Sonepat, Haryana. Here a Kalyugi daughter-in-law beat her 82-year-old mother-in-law badly. The video of which was shot by his innocent grandson playing at home and went viral on social media.
हरियाणा के सोनीपत से इंसानियत को शर्मसार कर देने वाला मामला सामने आया है। यहां एक कलयुगी बहू ने अपनी 82 साल की सास को बुरी तरह पीटा। जिसका वीडियो घर पर खेल रहे उसके मासूम पोते ने बना लिया और सोशल मीडिया पर वायरल कर दिया।
#Haryana #Sonepat #ViralVideo
entry.summary: A case of embarrassing humanity has been reported from Sonepat, Haryana. Here a Kalyugi daughter-in-law beat her 82-year-old mother-in-law badly. The video of which was shot by his innocent grandson playing at home and went viral on social media. हरियाणा के सोनीपत से इंसानियत को शर्मसार कर देने वाला मामला सामने आया है। यहां एक कलयुगी बहू ने अपनी 82 साल की सास को बुरी तरह पीटा। जिसका वीडियो घर पर खेल रहे उसके मासूम पोते ने बना लिया और सोशल मीडिया पर वायरल कर दिया। #Haryana #Sonepat #ViralVideo

entry.title: Why I Do What I Do: She blacked out while freediving

link.title: Why I Do What I Do: She blacked out while freediving

entry.content:
Why I do what I do is a bi-weekly series where we showcase uncommon professions and what it takes to go down that career path.
Leaving her corporate job for the ocean, freediver Lim Anqi started off scuba diving and later found her love for freediving. Going against societal norms and doubts, Anqi went ahead to set national records for Singapore.
entry.summary: Why I do what I do is a bi-weekly series where we showcase uncommon professions and what it takes to go down that career path. Leaving her corporate job for the ocean, freediver Lim Anqi started off scuba diving and later found her love for freediving. Going against societal norms and doubts, Anqi went ahead to set national records for Singapore.

entry.title: Santan Saptami 2020 : संतान सप्तमी पर संतान पाने के लिए करें ये काम । Boldsky

link.title: Santan Saptami 2020 : संतान सप्तमी पर संतान पाने के लिए करें ये काम । Boldsky

entry.content:
According to the Hindi Panchang, Saptami Tithi of Shukla Paksha of Bhadrapada month is observed on the seventh Saptami. On this day, Lord Shiva and Goddess Gauri are worshiped by law. He is pleased and blesses the devotees to have children, protect it and progress and skill.
हिंदी पंचांग के अनुसार, भाद्रपद मास के शुक्ल पक्ष की सप्तमी तिथि को संतान सप्तमी का व्रत किया जाता है। इस दिन भगवान शिव और माता गौरी की विधि विधान से पूजा की जाती है। वे प्रसन्न होकर भक्तों को संतान प्राप्ति, उसकी रक्षा और उन्नति व कुशलता का आशीर्वाद देते हैं।
#SantanSaptami2020 #SantanSaptami
entry.summary: According to the Hindi Panchang, Saptami Tithi of Shukla Paksha of Bhadrapada month is observed on the seventh Saptami. On this day, Lord Shiva and Goddess Gauri are worshiped by law. He is pleased and blesses the devotees to have children, protect it and progress and skill. हिंदी पंचांग के अनुसार, भाद्रपद मास के शुक्ल पक्ष की सप्तमी तिथि को संतान सप्तमी का व्रत किया जाता है। इस दिन भगवान शिव और माता गौरी की विधि विधान से पूजा की जाती है। वे प्रसन्न होकर भक्तों को संतान प्राप्ति, उसकी रक्षा और उन्नति व कुशलता का आशीर्वाद देते हैं। #SantanSaptami2020 #SantanSaptami

entry.title: Royaume-Uni : les ratés architecturaux du façadisme

link.title: Royaume-Uni : les ratés architecturaux du façadisme

entry.content:
Vous avez peut-être déjà observé les façades sauvées au moment de détruire de vieux immeubles. Cela s’appelle le façadisme. On reconstruit ensuite un bâtiment. En Grande-Bretagne, cette pratique tourne à la farce. Le mélange des genres n’est pas toujours réussi.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Vous avez peut-être déjà observé les façades sauvées au moment de détruire de vieux immeubles. Cela s’appelle le façadisme. On reconstruit ensuite un bâtiment. En Grande-Bretagne, cette pratique tourne à la farce. Le mélange des genres n’est pas toujours réussi. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Demos held in Kisumu, Nakuru over Covid funds ‘theft’

link.title: Demos held in Kisumu, Nakuru over Covid funds ‘theft’

entry.content: Human rights activists in Kisumu and Nakuru on Monday held demonstrations demanding for arrest and prosecution of those involved in the alleged theft and loss of billions of Covid-19 funds.
entry.summary: Human rights activists in Kisumu and Nakuru on Monday held demonstrations demanding for arrest and prosecution of those involved in the alleged theft and loss of billions of Covid-19 funds.

entry.title: Sushant Rajput Case: ED ने Rhea Chakraborty के Father को भेजा समन वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Sushant Rajput Case: ED ने Rhea Chakraborty के Father को भेजा समन वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
The Enforcement Directorate has again summoned Indrajeet Chakraborty, father of actor Rhea Chakraborty, in connection with Sushant Singh Rajput death case, an official said on Thursday. Earlier, Rhea and her brother Showik Chakraborty were also questioned by the ED regarding the case.Watch video,
बॉलीवुड एक्टर सुशांत सिंह राजपूत केस को लेकर सीबीआई लगातार जांच कर रही है. इसके साथ ही मनी लॉन्ड्रिंग केस में ईडी भी लगातार जांच पड़ताल में जुटी हुई है. ईडी की ओर से अब रिया के पिता इंद्रजीत चक्रवर्ती को समन भेजा गया है. ईडी ने अपने समन में कहा है कि साथ में बैंक लॉकर की चाबी भी लाएं. रिया चक्रवर्ती के परिवार से ईडी और सीबीआई की टीम लगातार पूछताछ कर रही है. देखें वीडियो
#SushantRajputCase #RheaChakraborty #ED
entry.summary: The Enforcement Directorate has again summoned Indrajeet Chakraborty, father of actor Rhea Chakraborty, in connection with Sushant Singh Rajput death case, an official said on Thursday. Earlier, Rhea and her brother Showik Chakraborty were also questioned by the ED regarding the case.Watch video, बॉलीवुड एक्टर सुशांत सिंह राजपूत केस को लेकर सीबीआई लगातार जांच कर रही है. इसके साथ ही मनी लॉन्ड्रिंग केस में ईडी भी लगातार जांच पड़ताल में जुटी हुई है. ईडी की ओर से अब रिया के पिता इंद्रजीत चक्रवर्ती को समन भेजा गया है. ईडी ने अपने समन में कहा है कि साथ में बैंक लॉकर की चाबी भी लाएं. रिया चक्रवर्ती के परिवार से ईडी और सीबीआई की टीम लगातार पूछताछ कर रही है. देखें वीडियो #SushantRajputCase #RheaChakraborty #ED

entry.title: Locations entre particuliers : la lutte contre les dérives s’organisent

link.title: Locations entre particuliers : la lutte contre les dérives s’organisent

entry.content:
Pour contourner les interdits liés au Covid-19, de nombreuses fêtes clandestines sont organisées dans des locations, au grand dam des propriétaires face aux dégâts occasionnés. Airbnb a interdit les rassemblements de plus de 16 personnes.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Pour contourner les interdits liés au Covid-19, de nombreuses fêtes clandestines sont organisées dans des locations, au grand dam des propriétaires face aux dégâts occasionnés. Airbnb a interdit les rassemblements de plus de 16 personnes. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: #95: Hannah Jarret-Scott and Christina Gordon

link.title: #95: Hannah Jarret-Scott and Christina Gordon

entry.content: Welcome to The Scotsman Sessions. With the performing arts world shutting down for the foreseeable future, we are commissioning a series of short video performances from artists all around the country and releasing them on scotsman.com, with introductions by our critics.
entry.summary: Welcome to The Scotsman Sessions. With the performing arts world shutting down for the foreseeable future, we are commissioning a series of short video performances from artists all around the country and releasing them on scotsman.com, with introductions by our critics.

entry.title: Soal Sepeda Masuk Tol, Dishub DKI: Aspek Keamanan Tetap Diutamakan!

link.title: Soal Sepeda Masuk Tol, Dishub DKI: Aspek Keamanan Tetap Diutamakan!

entry.content:
KOMPAS.TV - Di masa pandemi Corona, terjadi peningkatan jumah pengguna sepeda di Ibu Kota.
Data Dishub DKI Jakarta menunjukkan, rata-rata kenaikan volume pesepeda, mencapai 15 persen.
Gubernur DKI Jakarta, Anies Baswedan lalu mengusulkan, pemanfaatan satu ruas jalan Tol Lingkar Dalam Jakarta, sebagai lintasan road bike.
Menurut rencana, jalan Tol Lingkar Dalam Jakarta yang dibuka bagi pesepeda, adalah Cawang hingga Tanjung Priok Sisi Barat, dengan panjang 10 hingga 12 kilometer.
Hanya dibuka hari minggu, 06.00 09.00.
Kepala Dinas Perhubungan DKI Jakarta, Syafrin Liputo menjelaskan, pemanfaatan ruas jalan tol lingkar dalam Jakarta bagi pesepeda, tidak sepanjang hari.
Dishub DKI juga mengklaim, pengelola jalan tol telah setuju, penggunaan jalan tol sebagai jalur sepeda.
Anggota DPRD DKI Jakarta dari Fraksi PSI, William Aditya menyebut, usulan ini hanya bentuk pengalihan isu, dimana seharusnya Pemprov DKI lebih fokus penanganan pandemi.
Jika tujuannya peduli bagi pesepeda, maka seharusnya dicarikan lokasi yang baik, dan terintegrasi dengan angkutan umum.
Undang-undang telah mengatur penggunaan jalan tol.
Undang-undang nomor 38 tahun 2004 tentang jalan, di pasal 53 mengatur, jalan tol hanya diperuntukkan bagi pengguna jalan yang menggunakan kendaraan bermotor.
Sementara di peraturan pemerintah nomor 44, tahun 2009, di pasal 38 mengatur, jalan tol diperuntukkan bagi pengguna yang menggunakan kendaraan bermotor roda empat atau lebih.
Perhatian Pemrov DKI Jakarta terhadap keberadaan pesepeda, perlu diapresiasi.
Namun yang juga harus menjadi pertimbangan adalah, keamanan bagi pesepeda, maupun pengendara lainnya.
entry.summary: KOMPAS.TV - Di masa pandemi Corona, terjadi peningkatan jumah pengguna sepeda di Ibu Kota. Data Dishub DKI Jakarta menunjukkan, rata-rata kenaikan volume pesepeda, mencapai 15 persen. Gubernur DKI Jakarta, Anies Baswedan lalu mengusulkan, pemanfaatan satu ruas jalan Tol Lingkar Dalam Jakarta, sebagai lintasan road bike. Menurut rencana, jalan Tol Lingkar Dalam Jakarta yang dibuka bagi pesepeda, adalah Cawang hingga Tanjung Priok Sisi Barat, dengan panjang 10 hingga 12 kilometer. Hanya dibuka hari minggu, 06.00 09.00. Kepala Dinas Perhubungan DKI Jakarta, Syafrin Liputo menjelaskan, pemanfaatan ruas jalan tol lingkar dalam Jakarta bagi pesepeda, tidak sepanjang hari. Dishub DKI juga mengklaim, pengelola jalan tol telah setuju, penggunaan jalan tol sebagai jalur sepeda. Anggota DPRD DKI Jakarta dari Fraksi PSI, William Aditya menyebut, usulan ini hanya bentuk pengalihan isu, dimana seharusnya Pemprov DKI lebih fokus penanganan pandemi. Jika tujuannya peduli bagi pesepeda, maka seharusnya dicarikan lokasi yang baik, dan terintegrasi dengan angkutan umum. Undang-undang telah mengatur penggunaan jalan tol. Undang-undang nomor 38 tahun 2004 tentang jalan, di pasal 53 mengatur, jalan tol hanya diperuntukkan bagi pengguna jalan yang menggunakan kendaraan bermotor. Sementara di peraturan pemerintah nomor 44, tahun 2009, di pasal 38 mengatur, jalan tol diperuntukkan bagi pengguna yang menggunakan kendaraan bermotor roda empat atau lebih. Perhatian Pemrov DKI Jakarta terhadap keberadaan pesepeda, perlu diapresiasi. Namun yang juga harus menjadi pertimbangan adalah, keamanan bagi pesepeda, maupun pengendara lainnya.

entry.title: SP Balasubrahmanyam health condition Update By His Son S. P. Charan

link.title: SP Balasubrahmanyam health condition Update By His Son S. P. Charan

entry.content:
#LetsPrayForSPB: SP Balasubrahmanyam health condition Update By His Son S. P. Charan
#LetsPrayForSPB
#LegendarysingerSPBalasubrahmanyam
#SPBHealthUpdate
#SPBlifesupport
#SPCharan
#SPBhealthconditioncritical
#LyricistBalaji
#SPBonventilator
#SPBalasubrahmanyamHealthUpdate
#SPబాల సుబ్రహ్మణ్యం
#GetWellSoonSPB
#PrayforSPB
#SPBalasubrahmanyamalltimehitsongs
SP.బాలసుబ్రహ్మణ్యం ఆరోగ్య పరిస్థితి సంగీత ప్రియులను గత కొన్నిరోజులుగా తీవ్ర ఆందోళన కలిగిస్తున్న విషయం తెలిసిందే. అయితే మొత్తానికి ఈ గాన గంధర్వుడు కరోనాతో పోరాడి జయించారని కొద్దీ సేపటి క్రితమే కొన్ని వార్తలు వచ్చాయి. కానీ అందులో ఎలాంటి నిజం లేదని మళ్ళీ ఆయన తనయుడు చరణ్ వివరణ ఇచ్చారు. పరిస్థితి ప్రస్తుతం క్రిటికల్ గానే ఉందని, ఇంకా వెంటిలేటర్ పైనే ఉన్నట్లు చెప్పారు. నేడు నిర్వహించిన కోవిడ్ టెస్టులో ఆయనకు నెగిటివ్ వచ్చినట్లు అధికారిక ప్రకటన వెలువడినట్లు న్యూస్
entry.summary: #LetsPrayForSPB: SP Balasubrahmanyam health condition Update By His Son S. P. Charan #LetsPrayForSPB #LegendarysingerSPBalasubrahmanyam #SPBHealthUpdate #SPBlifesupport #SPCharan #SPBhealthconditioncritical #LyricistBalaji #SPBonventilator #SPBalasubrahmanyamHealthUpdate #SPబాల సుబ్రహ్మణ్యం #GetWellSoonSPB #PrayforSPB #SPBalasubrahmanyamalltimehitsongs SP.బాలసుబ్రహ్మణ్యం ఆరోగ్య పరిస్థితి సంగీత ప్రియులను గత కొన్నిరోజులుగా తీవ్ర ఆందోళన కలిగిస్తున్న విషయం తెలిసిందే. అయితే మొత్తానికి ఈ గాన గంధర్వుడు కరోనాతో పోరాడి జయించారని కొద్దీ సేపటి క్రితమే కొన్ని వార్తలు వచ్చాయి. కానీ అందులో ఎలాంటి నిజం లేదని మళ్ళీ ఆయన తనయుడు చరణ్ వివరణ ఇచ్చారు. పరిస్థితి ప్రస్తుతం క్రిటికల్ గానే ఉందని, ఇంకా వెంటిలేటర్ పైనే ఉన్నట్లు చెప్పారు. నేడు నిర్వహించిన కోవిడ్ టెస్టులో ఆయనకు నెగిటివ్ వచ్చినట్లు అధికారిక ప్రకటన వెలువడినట్లు న్యూస్

entry.title: Government only interested in business not people-SC

link.title: Government only interested in business not people-SC

entry.content:
The Supreme Court has said the government hadn’t addressed the “plight of the people due to the lockdown” and was only “interested in business” as it had failed to take a stand on waiving interest during the six-month loan moratorium that’s to end on August 31.
The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) had announced the halt on repayments to support borrowers hit by the Covid-19 pandemic and the lockdown that followed but has said that interest won’t be waived. The Supreme Court is hearing a plea seeking the waiver of interest during the moratorium period.
#SupremeCourt #COVID19 #RBI #Lockdown #EMIs
entry.summary: The Supreme Court has said the government hadn’t addressed the “plight of the people due to the lockdown” and was only “interested in business” as it had failed to take a stand on waiving interest during the six-month loan moratorium that’s to end on August 31. The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) had announced the halt on repayments to support borrowers hit by the Covid-19 pandemic and the lockdown that followed but has said that interest won’t be waived. The Supreme Court is hearing a plea seeking the waiver of interest during the moratorium period. #SupremeCourt #COVID19 #RBI #Lockdown #EMIs
